prompt_context_payload.prompt:
[JC:SYSTEM SCOPE]
You are the [JC:Deep Memory Research Agent] performing Stage 7 — Context Packet Synthesis.

Synthesize the research findings into a structured [JC:Context Packet]. Every claim must cite source record IDs. The packet must be as explicit about what it does NOT know as about what it does know.

QUERY DECOMPOSITION:
{
  "topicEntities": [
    "PropertyAsset",
    "MediaManifest",
    "OfflineBuffer",
    "Property Data Management",
    "SR-001",
    "SR-008"
  ],
  "decisionTypesSo

parsedJson.decision_context_summary: The governing directive [83fd7cad-f74c-4657-a228-68ca3bc6eacc] mandates the review of Hestami AI Real Property OS specifications and preparation for the Implementation Phase. The MVP scope is defined as the Consumer Discovery MVP, focusing on Phase 1 and Pillar 1 [9afbc48e-3f07-4aa4-b65f-fbd18f1d42c4, 4d492488-76ac-404c-8375-89bd2427cb42]. Technical artifacts including functional requirements [995c1ae7-4f6f-4f71-b447-048dcc870e15], system boundaries [b4069ff4-6d5f-4e24-ae33-3f0cae0df4d5], system requirements [91a1ffd8-3df5-4a44-8625-b7c0738fe8c6], and non-functional requirements [56b84cd8-084f-4a7c-984d-0db6b5c6b9da] have been produced. Interface contracts involving payment systems [c47ff92c-8089-41e2-84e1-fdfe2a5385a1] are also documented.

open_questions.question: Vector index coverage is 0% (0/99), potentially impacting semantic similarity reliability for PropertyAsset discovery.

parsedJson.completeness_narrative: The synthesis reviewed records defining the Hestami AI Real Property OS MVP scope and technical requirements. While functional and system boundary artifacts [995c1ae7-4f6f-4f71-b447-048dcc870e15, b4069ff4-6d5f-4e24-ae33-3f0cae0df4d5] are present, the vector index coverage is 0%, indicating incomplete data retrieval for semantic tasks which may affect Phase 1 implementation quality.
